message:
fix(tools): correct CRLF normalization and between-changes diff context

The normalized content builder was using trim_end() which stripped
trailing spaces along with \r, causing edit-tool match offsets to
misalign on lines with intentional trailing whitespace. Replace with
strip_suffix('\r') to only remove carriage returns.

Also fix generate_diff_string to properly collapse Equal parts between
two Changed parts: when the equal block exceeds 2*context_lines, show
context from both ends with an ellipsis separator instead of falling
through to single-sided logic that showed wrong context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
